name: Gurit Holding AG
summary: Gurit Holding AG, together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and sells advanced composite materials, related technologies, and finished parts and components to small family enterprises and large multinational corporations in Switzerland and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Tooling, Kitting, Composite Materials, and Aerospace. It offers fiber-reinforced pre-impregnated materials, structural core products, gel coats, adhesives, resins, and consumables; flame retardant materials; liquid and filled systems, such as laminating and infusion systems, filling and fairing products, multi-purpose systems, tooling products, and coatings; reinforcements; ancillaries and consumables; and other products comprising B√Ç¬≥ SmartPac, a construction solution that helps builders to manufacture composite components, as well as Hi-Panels, which are epoxy infused composite panels. The company also provides wind turbine blade kits; and tooling products consisting of wind blade master plugs, wind blade moulds, mould heating systems, wind blade hinge systems, and composite mineral castings, as well as mould alignment and clamping products. In addition, it offers composite engineering services to yachts, power boats, military and commercial vehicles, and civil structures and bridges, as well as architectural, vehicles and transportation, industrial, and renewable applications. The company was founded in 1835 and is based in Wattwil, Switzerland.
